title: Administrator Authorization
description: Empower Admins, help them clear overpowered modded enemies.
body:
### The Only Parts That Made By Mcreator Are Dimension , Items, and Block
### For The People That Dislike it

This mod adds two main item, Reality Destroyer and Authorizer. \
Both of them can only be held by the player that has permission level of 2 or above. \
They will automatically transform into "the sword" and "the paper" when holds by inqualified entity and turn back when it comes to right player.
# Reality Destroyer
Just a normal item with 1024 attack damage in general, but has a few modes that are more aggressive. \
You can switch between these modes by holding "R" in default.
1. "Damage" : deal additional 1024 damage that can't be blocked by most of original Minecraft method. -> for general circumstances
2. "Kill" : similar to "Damage", however the damage is much higher. -> for entities that have tens of thousands of health points
3. "Defeat" : setting entity's health to 0 and calling the original die function -> for those that only allow specific damage type or have strict damage limit.
4. "Annihilate" : remove the entity with all possible reason in original Minecraft with death drop. -> for entity that is protected so well that none of previous method hurts and we still need its loot
5. "Obliterate" : just like "Annihilate" but with not death drop -> for the situation that has so many useless but strong entity
6. To be determined
7. To be determined
8. "יום הדין" : blocking entity saving and reading and use obliterate finally -> for entity that will try to revive based on the data \
**If The Entity Still Exist, A Re-enter Would Help** \
**Don't Use This Too Much, It Will Increase File Size**

Press shift to switch to Alternative mode.
Unlike those 6 normal mode that kill mobs, Alternative modes take on things other than hurt.
1. "Weaken" : make the target's attack damage zero
2. "Disable" : make the target's movement speed zero
3. "Neutralizel : apply both "Weaken" and "Disable" while also stop entity's AI
4. "Damnatio Memoriae" : try send the entity to the world broader
- There are only 6+4 modes currently, more of which will be added for certain sitaution.
- All of these effects can be trigger by right clicking (default) which shoots a line that detect entity and apply the effect.
- There are a few configurations about Reality Destroyer (RD)
> 1. left click attack could be ranged with a configurable value
> 2. the max radius of right click attack can be configured, you can also make it accept multiple targets at once
> 3. you can lock Reality Destroyer in your inventory to prevent it from clear or seal. Just be careful that you can't replace its slot with another item.You need to move it first.
> 4. Reality Destroyer can break block as well and you can decide wether to drop the resource

**If there are entity remover from other mods, you may need to use them to fully remove the entity**

# Authorizer
You can authorize youself by a long right click. \
After being authorized, you won't die under any circumstance if I didn't miss something. \
Although you can't die while being authorized, the status would be refresh after a log out. In specific situations, you might die after relogin. \
It was intentional to avoid inqualified admins because authorization can't be tweaked once it being set. You can kick the player out and remove it from ops afterward.
- the config file of authorizer is seperated with RD's
- you can decide whether to open some protections with compatible issue
- they are all set to false in default while being really strong
> 1. lock data : strictly lock your data to the level when you use authorizer or above
> 2. no neutral effects : there exist some harmful effects that weren't correctly categorized and you can clear them if you want 
> 3. corrupt event : since the detection is not accurate enough, it can accidentally stop some operations you want
> 4. space interfere : avoid most attack from getting player's instance and thus won't cause damage
> 5. command protect : protect you from command block and datapack
# Anti Void and Nothingness
A special dimension and block that comprised it. \
There is nothing in Anti Void, and blocks in it can't be break by player. \
Thus you can consider it a prison for crime or admins' VIP room at your will. \
The only way to Anti Void is through Command which is also how you can get and break nothingness block.
